title: [MTR4] Lint 54 Pack
description: This resourcepack adds the Lint 54 diesel multiple unit.
body:
## THIS PACK IS STILL IN BETA, EXPECT BUGS

This pack adds the Lint 54 DMU to minecraft using the MTR mod.

**Included:**
- Deutsche Bahn Livery
- AKN Livery

And theres more planned.

### There are no displays or lights. they'll be added in the next few versions

Disclaimer:
This pack is not an official product of Alstom, DB, AKN
